exploreUrl:
<js>
(() => {
    let html = java.ajax("https://bbxxxx.com/"); 
    
    // 阅读 App 在执行发现页 JS 时，可以直接通过变量 page 获取当前页码
    // 如果 page 未定义，默认设为 1
    let p = (typeof page !== 'undefined') ? page : 1;

    const getUrl = (baseUrl) => {
        // 第一页保持原样，后续页码拼接 {{page}}.html
        // 注意：这里直接返回字符串结果，避免在字符串内部嵌套引号
        return p == 1 ? baseUrl : baseUrl + p + ".html";
    };

    let list = [
        { "title": "最新", "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com/rank/new/{{page}}.html"), "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } },
        { "title": "热门", "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com/rank/hot/{{page}}.html"), "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } },
        { "title": "完本", "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com/rank/complete/{{page}}.html"), "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } }
    ];
    
    // 分类
    list.push({ "title": "分类", "url": "", "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1 } });
    let reg1 = /<a href="(\/category\/\d+\/)">(.*?)<\/a>/g;
    let match1;
    while ((match1 = reg1.exec(html)) !== null) {
        list.push({
            "title": match1[2],
            "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com" + match1[1]) + "/{{page}}.html" +  ",{\"webView\":true}",
            "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.2 }
        });
    }

    // 标签
    list.push({ "title": "标签", "url": "", "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1 } });
    let reg = /<a href="(\/tag\/\d+\/)">(.*?)<\/a>/g;
    let match;
    while ((match = reg.exec(html)) !== null) {
        list.push({
            "title": match[2],
            "url": getUrl("https://bbxxxx.com" + match[1]) + "/{{page}}.html" + ",{\"webView\":true}",
            "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.2 }
        });
    }
    
    return JSON.stringify(list);
})()
</js>

bookSourceComment: 【注意】搜索词限制在3个字以内，超出则无结果

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
var doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
function text(selector) {
  var node = doc.select(selector).first();
  return node ? String(node.text()).trim() : '';
}
function attr(selector, name) {
  var node = doc.select(selector).first();
  return node ? String(node.attr(name)).trim() : '';
}
function abs(u) {
  u = String(u || '').trim();
  if (!u) return '';
  if (u.indexOf('//') === 0) return 'https:' + u;
  if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(u)) return u;
  return new java.net.URL(new java.net.URL(baseUrl), u).toString();
}
var html = String(result);
var authorMatch = html.match(/作者[：:]\s*<a[^>]*>([^<]*)<\/a>/);
var cover = attr('div.detail-main-cover img', 'data-original') || attr('div.detail-main-cover img', 'src');
JSON.stringify({
  name: text('p.detail-main-info-title'),
  author: authorMatch ? String(authorMatch[1]).trim() : '',
  cover: abs(cover),
  intro: text('p.detail-desc'),
  kind: '漫画',
  latest: text('ul.detail-list-1 li:last-child a'),
  url: baseUrl
});
</js>
ruleBookInfo.name: $.name

bookSourceComment:
幻梦轻小说API书源
密码：bookapi

TG交流群：https://t.me/huanmengnovel

由于一直疯狂被人举报免费书源、软件、QQ群，所以QQ群以后长期禁言

幻梦轻小说全网最齐全的轻小说网，访问速度优质而且网页内置插图，拥有海量的轻小说书籍，如果有网页bug或者需求的小说可以进网站群及时反馈


作者留言：

1.0更新：本网站所有的小说都是免费的，目前已经有了PC端和wap端，APP端目前还有点问题需要调试

本次初次制作好了对接阅读的书源，但是为了避免被大规模盗刷流量，书源暂时没有对接插图

2.0更新：本次更新解决了插图问题，让书源可以显示插图，显示不出来多刷新就行

站长在Cdn处新增速率限制，超过限制会被拉黑，国外地区也会无法访问插图，非官网访问也会无法访问插图

如果后续阅读方面流量过于异常，我会关闭阅读的阅读插图渠道，希望各位可以理解

2.1更新：新增发现页面的选项功能，用户可以更快速便捷的从分类和题材中寻找自己想要的小说

2.2更新：修复发现页面的分类功能异常的问题，现在移除文库分类

2.3更新：修复发现界面过于拥挤，点击作者无法快速搜索作者，总有几本推荐阅读始终占据分类书籍顶部的问题，这里感谢QQ用户雪隐梅香提供的修复


2.4更新：优化了插图排版的问题，如果插图不是一张图片一页，可以尝试在阅读界面右上角手动把图片样式改为SINGLE

2.5更新：本次网站将图床更换为了下行宽带300M，上行200M的大宽带服务器，方便大家更快的使用。与此同时修复了更换图床后，插图异常不显示的问题

2.6更新：网友修改优化版本，由于海外线路需要人机交互，修复了海外线路被阻拦，无法使用书源的问题

2.7更新：修复阅读app下载过快，会触发拉黑的问题，限制并发

2.8更新：兼容苹果用户的读不舍手书源，修复目录异常的问题

注意：

此书源支持苹果用户的TF测试版的读不舍手

以前书源版本可能会出现目录没有文章，或者显示异常

我没有苹果手机，也无法测试和写书源，能够适配一个苹果书源我已经尽力了，大家见谅


2.9更新：上调并发率，并发率太低可能会出现图片加载异常，太高会导致被拉黑

3.0更新：在发现功能中，新增一个【最新】按钮功能，自动索引获取时间戳最新入库50本小说

4.0大更新：本次服务器大优化，配置翻倍到8C8G

全面重写书源，将书源对接改为端口对接，可以设置密码杜绝恶意传播/傻福使用

新增分享页超50+选项

对接信息页信息功能，修复信息页简介丢失异常。

5.0大更新：
新增接口密码，接口错误无法访问与获取网站内容

新增对接书籍屏蔽，同步网站下架与屏蔽手机下架书籍

初步对接阅读文章页章节内容，但插图还有一些问题

新增对接标签获取，信息页可以更好的展示更多信息。

6.0大更新：
修复拦截与加密导致的书源插图失效

修复下架的搜索拦截问题

修复目录获取拦截，文内下架提示异常问题

新增Cloudflare拦截内置浏览器验证功能

重写后端接口，修复部分信息提供，避免编码转换导致插图异常

7.1大更新：
优化后端图片类型的格式，加快图片加载速度（暂不适配苹果书源，会出现没图片的情况）

优化插图部分的限速问题

优化文章内容页的限速问题

修复目录页上限100章的后端异常问题

重写端口优化多层嵌套问题，大幅度提高搜索与加载能力，提升速度2~5倍

8.0大更新（请勿非法售卖此免费书源）：
新增接口密匙核对错误时候的内容提醒

新增接口密匙核对错误后的提醒公告

优化部分阅读内容获取的异常问题


更多详情内容，可以关注：www.huanmengacg.com

APP下载链接：https://h5.cloud.189.cn/share.html#/t/MRNR7nEBVZZj%EF%BC%88%E8%AE%BF%E9%97%AE%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%9A0jn0%EF%BC%89

<js>
var doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var ua = 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36';
function abs(u) {
  u = String(u || '').trim();
  if (!u) return '';
  if (u.indexOf('//') === 0) return 'https:' + u;
  if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(u)) return u;
  return new java.net.URL(new java.net.URL(baseUrl), u).toString();
}
function withHeaders(u, ref) {
  u = abs(u);
  if (!u) return '';
  return u + ',' + JSON.stringify({headers:{Referer:ref || baseUrl, 'User-Agent':ua}});
}
function pickText(el, selector) {
  var node = el.select(selector).first();
  return node ? String(node.text()).trim() : '';
}
function pickAttr(el, selector, attr) {
  var node = el.select(selector).first();
  return node ? String(node.attr(attr)).trim() : '';
}
var data = [];
if (String(baseUrl).replace(/\/+$|\?.*$/g, '') === 'https://www.wnian001.com') {
  var hots = doc.select('a.hot-keyword');
  for (var h = 0; h < hots.size(); h++) {
    var hot = hots.get(h);
    var hotName = String(hot.text()).trim();
    var hotUrl = abs(hot.attr('href'));
    var hotId = (hotUrl.match(/\/post\/(\d+)\.html/i) || [])[1];
    var cover = hotId ? 'https://imgs.34img.cc/manga-cover/' + hotId + '/cover.jpg' : '';
    if (hotName && hotUrl) data.push({name: hotName, author: '', bookUrl: hotUrl, coverUrl: withHeaders(cover, hotUrl), kind: '热搜', intro: ''});
  }
} else {
  var items = doc.select('article.excerpt');
  for (var i = 0; i < items.size(); i++) {
    var item = items.get(i);
    var name = pickText(item, 'h2 a');
    var bookUrl = abs(pickAttr(item, 'h2 a', 'href'));
    var cover = pickAttr(item, '.thumbnail img, .focus img', 'data-src') || pickAttr(item, '.thumbnail img, .focus img', 'src');
    var kind = pickText(item, 'p.cat');
    var status = pickText(item, 'span.subtitle');
    if (status) kind = kind ? kind + ' ' + status : status;
    var intro = pickText(item, 'p.note');
    if (name && bookUrl) data.push({name: name, author: '', bookUrl: bookUrl, coverUrl: withHeaders(cover, bookUrl), kind: kind, intro: intro});
  }
}
JSON.stringify({data: data});
</js>

bookSourceComment: 作者: wwwcloger

如果是用的官方版阅读，或者低版本阅读，推荐更新阅读以使用新功能，否则很多功能无法使用哦
软件下载地址：https://legado.gyks.cf
推荐使用阅读R或者阅读Sigma


晴天聚合重构，已适配所有安卓版本阅读
目前不适配苹果端栖阅(可以正常阅读，发现页无法适配)

更新日志请点击登录，更新书源中查看

基础使用教程：
1、搜索：
    1)基础搜索：在发现页长按该书源，点击搜索，直接搜，搜索范围(全部来源小说)
    2)进阶搜索：在登陆-书源设置中选择指定模式/来源，可搜索指定模式/来源内容
    3)快捷搜索：使用特殊关键词(x,t,m,d,@)搜索
         x:书名@来源  如(x:十日终焉@番茄)
         t:书名@来源  如(t:十日终焉@番茄)
         m:书名@来源  如(m:十日终焉@番茄)
         d:书名@来源  如(d:十日终焉@番茄)
         其中：x表示小说(可省略)，t表示听书，m表示漫画，d表示短剧
         冒号支持中文英文
         
2、发现页：
    在书源设置中选择指定模式或者单个来源，然后刷新发现页即可
    
3、更多使用方式进入书源设置页面应该能一目了然

var hasValidCookie = fqssionid.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

    try {

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
let moreSettings = getVariable('更多设置');


function fetchBookDetail(result) {
	  let res = {};
	  //java.log(baseUrl)
	  //java.longToast(result)
	  if (String(baseUrl).startsWith("data:")) {
    res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
    } else {
    	return result;
    	}
    const book_id = res.book_id;
    const tab = res.tab;
    const sources = res.sources || res.source;
    const url = res.url;
    let html = "";
    const proxy  = moreSettings && moreSettings['网络模式'] || '服务器';

    if (url && proxy == "本地") {
        html = fetchHtmlWithFallback(url, sources);
    }

    const varia = getAndFormatCustomVariable();
    const requestUrl = `/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia}`;

    java.log(requestUrl);
    return request(requestUrl, 'POST', { html: html });
}

function fetchHtmlWithFallback(url, sources) {
    let html;
    let ck69 = '';
    let headers = {};
    let op = '';

    if (sources == '69书吧') {
        ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
        headers = {
            "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent": java.getWebViewUA()
        };
        op = JSON.stringify({ "headers": headers });
        html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }

    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
        cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();
    }

    return html;
}

function getAndFormatCustomVariable() {
    let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (varia === 'null') {
        varia = '';
    }
    return JSON.stringify({ 'custom': varia });
}
fetchBookDetail(result)
</js>$.data
ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
const {
    source:sources,
    book_id,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info,
    read_count,
    read_count_all
} = result;
let moreSettings = getVariable('更多设置');


const proxy = (moreSettings && moreSettings['网络模式'] || '服务器') == "本地" ? "本地网络" : "服务器网络";

if ((book.readConfig && book.readConfig.useReplaceRule) == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
let qttoken = getToken();
if (qttoken.length > 10) {
     nickname = '账号状态：✅已登录';
}
try {
    const user_info = JSON.parse(request(`/get_avatar`, 'GET'));
    if (user_info.code === 0) {
        nickname = user_info.nickname 
            ? `欢迎回来：${user_info.nickname}`
            : `欢迎回来：${user_info.email}(请前往用户后台设置用户名)`;
    }
} catch (e) {
    
}

const loginStatus = nickname;
const lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
const heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

const isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle =  book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';

const formatAbstract = (text) => {
    return text.split("\n").map(line => `    ${line}`).join("\n");
};

const buildBasicInfo = (items) => {
    let info = "";
    for (let [value, prefix, icon] of items) {
        if (isValid(value)) {
            info += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
        }
    }
    return info;
};

let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${BaseUrl()}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom')) || '4';
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

const fullBasicInfo = buildBasicInfo([
    [tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈"],
    [role, "书籍主角：", "👑"],
    [last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚"],
    [last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳"],
    [word_number, "书籍字数：", "📝"],
    [status, "书籍状态：", "🚩"],
    [score, "书籍评分：", "⭐"],
    [read_count, "今阅读人数：", "📃"],
    [read_count_all, "总阅读人数：", "📈"]
]);

if (fullBasicInfo) {
    info += `${lightDivider}\n${fullBasicInfo}`;
}

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${formatAbstract(abstract)}
`;
} else {
    info += heavyDivider;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += lightDivider;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()}
`;

const abstractMode = moreSettings && moreSettings['完整简介'] || 'true';
if (abstractMode == "false") {
    const simplifiedBasicInfo = buildBasicInfo([
        [last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚"],
        [last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳"],
        [word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊"],
        [status, "书籍状态：", "🚩"],
        [score, "书籍评分：", "⭐"]
    ]);
    
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n${simplifiedBasicInfo}${isValid(abstract) ? `\n${heavyDivider}\n    📖 书籍简介：\n${formatAbstract(abstract)}` : heavyDivider}`;
} else {
    info = info.split("\n").map(line => line.replace(/^ {4}/, "")).join("\n");
}
</js>

<js>
let DEFAULT_TONE_ID = '4';
let CONTENT_URL = '/content';
let CONTENT_URL_WITH_REVIEW = '/content?review=1';
let VERSION = localVersion;
let SOURCES_WITH_REVIEW = ['番茄', '七猫', '塔读', 'QQ阅读', 'svip_QQ阅读'];
let SOURCES_VIDEO = ['毒舌影视', 'NT动漫'];

const reading = moreSettings && moreSettings['同步书架'] || 'false';
const reading_toast = moreSettings && moreSettings['同步弹窗'] || 'true';

result = String(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
let res = JSON.parse(result);
let { book_id, item_id, tab, title, sources, url } = res;

let islyc = checkEnv();
try {
    book.imageStyle = islyc == '改版' ? 'FULL' : 'TEXT';
} catch (e) {
    
}

const syncBookShelf = (book) => {
    if (!book) {
        return;
    }
    let book_order = book.order;
    if (book_order!=0) {
    	   book_order = 1;
    	} else {
    		book_order = 2;
    		}
    
    if (reading != "true") {
        return;
    }

    try {
        const ritem = item_id;
        
let book_info = {
            book_name:book.name,
            author:book.author,
            //abstract:book.abstract,
            thumb_url:book.coverUrl,
            book_id,
            tab,
            source: sources
        };
        if (!book_info || typeof book_info != "object") {
            return;
        }
        const rurl = `/add_book_to_book_shelf`;
        book_info.read_status = book_order;
        book_info.last_chapter_item_id = item_id;
        book_info.last_chapter_title = chapter.title || "";
        //java.toast(JSON.stringify(book_info));
       	try {
       		const check_book_url = `/check_book_in_book_shelf`;
    checkResponse = request(check_book_url, "POST", {book_id,source:sources,tab});
} catch (e) {
    java.log(`检查书籍请求失败: ${e}`);
}
    
        const check_data = parseJsonSafely(checkResponse);
        try {
            if (check_data.data.id) {
                book_info.id = check_data.data.id;
                const uurl = `/update_book_shelf`;
                let up = request(uurl, "POST", book_info);
                if (reading_toast == "true") {
                	    java.toast(up)
                	}
                
            } else {
                let up = request(rurl, "POST", book_info);
                if (reading_toast == "true") {
                	    java.toast(up)
                	}
            }
        } catch (e) {
            try {
                let up = request(rurl, "POST", book_info);
                java.toast(up)
            } catch (e) {
                if (reading_toast == "true") {
                	    java.toast(`书架操作失败: ${e}`);
                	}
            }

        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log(`书籍同步流程异常: ${error}`);
        
        if (reading_toast == "true") {
                	    java.longToast("\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。");
                	}
    }
};

if (book.durChapterIndex == chapter.index) {

        };

    if (html.includes('Just a moment...') && sources == '69书吧' && book.durChapterIndex == chapter.index) {
        cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, '需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证').body();
    }
}

let tone_id = varia1 || DEFAULT_TONE_ID;
let base_url = BaseUrl();
let dpSettings = getVariable('段评设置');
let para = dpSettings && dpSettings['段评开关'] || 'true';
let show_img = moreSettings && moreSettings['显示图片'] || 'true';

let params = {
    html,
    item_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    tone_id,
    variable: varia,
    version: VERSION
};

let hasReview = SOURCES_WITH_REVIEW.includes(sources) && para=="true" && tab == '小说';
let content_url = hasReview ? CONTENT_URL_WITH_REVIEW : CONTENT_URL;

let data = request(content_url, 'POST', params);
try {
    data = JSON.parse(data);
    if (data.msg) {
        java.toast(data.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    //console.error('Parse content data failed:', e);
}

let content = data.content || '';

if (show_img == 'false') {
    content = removeAllImgTags(content);
}

if (hasReview) {
    let fqssionid = java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com', 'sessionid');
    content = content
        .replace(/ident="/g, `ident="${base_url}`)
        .replace(/book_id=/g, `book_id=${book_id}&ssionid=${fqssionid}`);
    let deviceType = '安卓';
    try {
    	java.deviceID();
    	deviceType = '苹果'
    	} catch {}
    content = deviceType == '苹果' 
        ? paraForiOS(content, sources) 
        : paraForAndroid(content, sources);
}

data = JSON.stringify({ content });

let isVideoSource = SOURCES_VIDEO.some(src => sources.includes(src));
let isVideoTab = tab == '短剧' || tab == '视频';
if (islyc != '苹果' && (isVideoTab || isVideoSource)) {
    data = JSON.stringify({
        content: `【右上角刷新】开启播放(下一集请切换下一章刷新)\n播放直链：\n${content}`
    });
    
    if (book.durChapterIndex == chapter.index) {
        let video_url = `${base_url}/online_video?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}`;
        if (isVideoSource) {
            video_url = content;
        }
        //java.openVideoPlayer(content, title)
        java.startBrowser(video_url, title);
        java.toast('正在加载视频...');
    }
}

data;

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
const res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
const {
	book_name,
	author,
	abstract,
	thumb_url,
    book_id,
    tab,
    sources,
    url
} = res;
let durChapterIndex = book.durChapterIndex;
java.put('book_id', book_id);
let html = "";
let moreSettings = getVariable('更多设置');
const proxy = moreSettings && moreSettings['网络模式'] || '服务器';
const showSource = moreSettings && moreSettings['目录显示来源'] || 'true';
const gytoken = getToken();
const reading = moreSettings && moreSettings['同步书架'] || 'false';
const reading_toast = moreSettings && moreSettings['同步弹窗'] || 'true';

if (url && proxy == "本地") {
    if (sources == "69书吧") {
        const ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie("https://www.69shuba.com"));
        const headers = {
            "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent": java.getWebViewUA()
        };
        const op = JSON.stringify({
            headers
        });
        html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }

    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources === "69书吧") {
        cookie.removeCookie("https://www.69shuba.com");
        java.longToast("需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证");
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();
        java.log(html);
    }
}


const customVar = String(book.getVariable("custom"));
const varia = JSON.stringify({
    custom: customVar == "null" ? "" : customVar
});

const queryString = `book_id=${encodeURIComponent(book_id)}&source=${encodeURIComponent(sources)}&tab=${encodeURIComponent(tab)}&variable=${encodeURIComponent(varia)}`;
const data = request(`/catalog?${queryString}`, "POST", {
    html
});

const device_type = checkEnv();
const typeMap = {
    "小说": {
        "苹果": 0,
        default: 8
    },
    "听书": {
        "苹果": 1,
        default: 32
    },
    "漫画": {
        "苹果": 2,
        default: 64
    },
    "短剧": {
        "苹果": 3,
        "备用": 4,
        default: 8
    }
};
const currentType = typeMap[tab] || typeMap["小说"];
book.type = currentType[device_type] || currentType.default;



const syncBookShelf = (data, book, gytoken) => {
    if (!book) {
        return;
    }
    let book_order = book.order;
    if (book_order!=0) {
    	   book_order = 1;
    	} else {
    		book_order = 2;
    		}
    if (reading != "true") {
        return;
    }

    try {
        if (!data || !gytoken) {
            java.log("缺少必要参数");
            return;
        }

        const parsedData = parseJsonSafely(data);
        if (!parsedData || !parsedData.data || !Array.isArray(parsedData.data) || !parsedData.data[durChapterIndex]) {
            return;
        }

        const ritem = parsedData.data[durChapterIndex];
        
let book_info = {
            book_name,
            author,
            abstract,
            thumb_url,
            book_id,
            tab,
            source: sources
        };
        if (!book_info || typeof book_info != "object") {
            return;
        }
        const rurl = `/add_book_to_book_shelf`;
        book_info.read_status = book_order;
        book_info.last_chapter_item_id = ritem.item_id || "";
        book_info.last_chapter_title = ritem.title || "";
        //java.toast(JSON.stringify(book_info));
       	try {
       		const check_book_url = `/check_book_in_book_shelf`;
    checkResponse = request(check_book_url, "POST", {book_id,source:sources,tab});
} catch (e) {
    java.log(`检查书籍请求失败: ${e}`);
}
    
        const check_data = parseJsonSafely(checkResponse);
        try {
            let chapterIndex = findItemIndex(parsedData.data,check_data.data.last_chapter_item_id)
            durChapterIndex = chapterIndex;
            if (book.durChapterIndex < chapterIndex) {
            	book_info.last_chapter_item_id = check_data.data.last_chapter_item_id;
            	}
            
            if (chapterIndex != 0 && book.durChapterIndex < chapterIndex) {
                book.durChapterIndex = chapterIndex;
            }
            if (check_data.data.id) {
                book_info.id = check_data.data.id;
                const uurl = `/update_book_shelf`;
                if (book_order==1){
                	let up = request(uurl, "POST", book_info);
                   if (reading_toast == "true") {
                	    java.toast(up)
                	  }
                	}
                
            } else {
                if (book_order==1){
                let up = request(rurl, "POST", book_info);
                if (reading_toast == "true") {
                	    java.toast(up)
                	}
            }}
        } catch (e) {
            try {
                if (book_order==1){
                let up = request(rurl, "POST", book_info);
                if (reading_toast == "true") {
                	    java.toast(up)
                	}}
            } catch (e) {
                if (reading_toast == "true") {
                	    java.toast(`书架操作失败: ${e}`);
                	}
            }

        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log(`书籍同步流程异常: ${error}`);
        if (reading_toast == "true") {
                	    java.longToast("\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。");
                	}
        
    }
};

try {syncBookShelf(data, book, gytoken);}catch{}


function processCatalogList(data) {
    let catalog_list = parseJsonSafely(data).data;


    if (catalog_list && catalog_list.length > 0) {

        let lastItem = catalog_list[catalog_list.length - 1];


        if (lastItem && typeof lastItem == 'object' && lastItem.source && lastItem.title) {

            lastItem.title = lastItem.source + ':' + lastItem.title;
        }
    }
    return JSON.stringify({
        'data': catalog_list
    });
}

if (showSource == "true") {
    processCatalogList(data);
} else {
    data;
}

</js>$.data

2026.5.12日更新：
1.移除失效书源
2.增加多个专属书源
奇书网，小说狂人，红牛小说
笔仙阁，追光阅读，八零小说

❤️‍🔥登录必看❤️‍🔥

否则读取不到输入的账号密码
2.跳转卡顿在设置→其他设置中清除WebView缓存

🔔适配兼容
IOS仅适配:源阅,用心读书

🔥注：阅读请使用最新测试版
1.所有源站每20秒最多12章，把预下载调到0-3之间使用
💯[打赏VIP无请求限制,专属书源]
2.自定义源站示例：番茄小说,七猫小说  多个源站用英文,号分隔
源站名参考 登录URL //书源配置列表 v参数

4.搜索模式：
书名@来源 多个来源用英文,号分隔
示例： 
系统@番茄小说，多个源站使用英文,号分隔
书名@类型 返回对应类型所有源站数据，可直接使用@方式搜索或者点击登陆切换模式
示例： 
系统@小说  听书  漫画  短剧等
默认书名排序
指定作者优先：
作者名@作者   作者名@作者,源站

<js>
let config = (() => {
    try {
        let cfg = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())[0] || {};
        if (!cfg.host || !cfg.gender) {
            cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
            source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
            java.toast("配置初始化完成");
        }
        return cfg;
    } catch(e) {
        let cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
        source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
        return cfg;
    }
})();
    
let rawVariable = source.getVariable();
let 个人中心 = 1;
let obj = (title, url, type) => ({
  title: title,
  url: url,
  style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: type }
});

let sort = [];
let push = (title, url, type) => sort.push(obj(title, url, type));

let currentType = "";
let currentSource = "";
try {
  let vArray = JSON.parse(rawVariable);
  if (vArray.length > 0) {
    let v = vArray[0];
    currentType = v.gender || "";
    currentSource = v.source || "";
  }
} catch(e) {
  currentType = "";
  currentSource = "";
}

const getGenderDisplayName = (gender) => {
  if (gender == "boy") return "男频";
  if (gender == "girl") return "女频";
  return "";
};

const genderDisplay = getGenderDisplayName(currentType);

push(`当前为【${currentSource || "番茄小说"}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}`, "", 1);

if (currentSource == "晋江") {
	   sort.push({
        title: "📝点击签到",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jj_signin`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
    
    sort.push({
        title: "📂我的收藏",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jjbookshelf?token=`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
}

const excludedSources = ["小说", "听书", "漫画", "视频", "短剧", "音频","番茄小说"];

if (currentSource && !excludedSources.includes(currentSource)) {
  try {
    let apiUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}`;
    if (currentType) {
      apiUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
    }
    
    let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(apiUrl));
    
    if (response.data && response.data.found) {
      response.data.found.forEach(item => {
        let finalUrl = "";
        if (item.url) {
          finalUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}&page={{page}}&url=${item.url}`;
          if (currentType) {
            finalUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
          }
        }
        sort.push({
          title: item.title,
          url: finalUrl,
          style: item.style || { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
        });
      });
    } else {
      push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
    }
  } catch(e) {
    push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
  }
  JSON.stringify(sort);
} else {
  let recommendUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_recommend?session=" + getSessionId();
    let guessUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_guess?session=" + getSessionId();
    push('个性推荐', recommendUrl, 0.45);
    push('猜你喜欢', 'https://fanqienovel.com/tab/cai', 0.45);

  push('热搜榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=12&type=1', 0.29);

  }

  let gro = [];
  let pushGro = (title, url, type) => gro.push(obj(title, url, type));

  let sArr = [];

  if (hasValidSession) {
    try {
      let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + getSessionId()));

      if (book_shelf_info.code == 0) {
        个人中心 = 1;
        
        let groups_bookids = { "未分组": [] };
        book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
          if (!groups_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) 
            groups_bookids[i.group_name] = [];
          groups_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id);
        });

        Object.keys(groups_bookids).forEach(k => {
          pushGro(k, "https://fanqienovel.com/fqbookshelf/groupName/" + k, 0.4);
        });
        if (Object.keys(groups_bookids).length % 2 != 0) pushGro("占位", "", 0.4);
        
        sArr.push(obj(username + '的个人中心', '', 1));
        sArr.push(obj("我的书架", "https://fanqienovel.com/fqbookshelf", 1));
        sArr = sArr.concat(gro);
        sArr.push(obj("阅读历史", getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + getSessionId() + "&page={{page}}", 1));
      } else {
        个人中心 = 0;
        java.toast("获取书架信息失败，登录可能已过期");
      }
    } catch (e) {
      个人中心 = 0;
      java.toast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏个人中心");
    }
  } else {
    个人中心 = 0;
    java.toast("您还未登录番茄账号，无法同步数据");
  }

  sort = sArr.concat(sort);
  JSON.stringify(sort);
}
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
function getBookIdFull(url) {
    const {java} = this;
    let $ = JSON.parse(url).data;
    let arr = [];
    if ($.book_shelf_info && $.book_shelf_info.length > 0) {
        arr = $.book_shelf_info.map(item => item.book_id);
    } else if ($.data_list && $.data_list.length > 0) {
        arr = $.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str);
    } else {
        java.toast("获取 book_id 失败，你可能需要登录！");
    }
    return arr;
}

let session = getSessionId()

getShelf = () => {
    let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + session)
    
    bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
    
    let id_list = splitArray(bid, 200)
    let urls = []
    id_list.forEach(i => {
        urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
    })
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
    let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() +"/book_shelf?session=" + session))
    
    let group_bookids = {
        "未分组": []
    }
    book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
        if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
        group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id)
    })
    
    if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
    
    let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 200)
    let urls = []

    book_ids.forEach(i => { 	urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
    })
    
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
    let url = _mlsec.requestHeader(
        "bookmall/tab",
        "version_name=5.8.9.32",
        null,
        "sessionid=" + session
    )
    let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
    let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index].cell_data
    if (!tab) tab = []
    let bookList = []
    for (let i of tab) {
        bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    }
    return { book_info: bookList }
}

function getGuessYouLike() {
    let apiUrl = 'https://reading.snssdk.com/reading/bookapi/bookmall/tab/v/?version_name=5.8.9.32&device_id=1024&device_type=114514&iid=2048&aid=1967&channel=0&os_version=0&app_name=novelapp&version_code=58932&device_platform=android'
    let response = java.ajax(apiUrl + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
        headers: {
            'Cookie': "sessionid=" + session
        }
    }))
    let responseData = JSON.parse(response)
    let finalResult = {
        code: 0,
        message: 'SUCCESS',
        data: {
            cell_view: {
                book_data: []
            }
        }
    }
    if (responseData && responseData.data && responseData.data.tab_item && responseData.data.tab_item.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data[0].book_data) {
        finalResult.data.cell_view.book_data = responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data[0].book_data
    }
    return finalResult
}

function normalizeResponse(data) {
    if (data.data && data.data.book_list && Array.isArray(data.data.book_list)) {
        return data.data.book_list;
    }
    
    if (data.book_info) return data.book_info;
    if (data.data && data.data.book_info) return data.data.book_info;
    if (data.data && Array.isArray(data.data)) return data.data;
    if (data.list) return data.list;
    if (data.book_list) return data.book_list;
    if (data.data && data.data.publication_list) return data.data.publication_list;
    if (data.result) return data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.result) return data.data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.cell_view && data.data.cell_view.book_data) {
        return data.data.cell_view.book_data;
    }
    if (data.data && data.data.records) return data.data.records;
    if (data.data && data.data.list) return data.data.list;
    
    return [];
}

if (baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let sortKey = getSortKey() || '';
    let newUrl = baseUrl + sortKey;
    result = JSON.parse(java.ajax(newUrl));
    
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData});
} else if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) {
    result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
} else if(/read_history/.test(baseUrl)) {
    let pageMatch = baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/);
    let page = pageMatch ? pageMatch[1] : '1';
    
    let history_response = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + session + "&page=" + page)
    let history_data = JSON.parse(history_response)
    
    if (history_data.data.data_list) {
        let book_ids = history_data.data.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str)
        
        let id_list = splitArray(book_ids, 200)
        let urls = []
        id_list.forEach(i => {
          urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
        })
        
        let resp = {book_info: []}
        urls.forEach(url => {
            let detailResponse = java.ajax(url)
            let detailData = JSON.parse(detailResponse)
            if (detailData.data) {
                resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(detailData.data)
            }
        })
        
        result = resp
    } else {
        result = {book_info: []}
    }
} else if (baseUrl.includes("style_top")) {
    result = JSON.parse(result);
} else if (baseUrl.includes("/tab/cai")) {
    result = getGuessYouLike();
} else {
    let w = baseUrl.split("/")
    if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
        result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
    } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
        result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
    } else {
        result = JSON.parse(result)
        if (result.data && result.data.data) {
            result = {book_info: result.data.data}
        }
    }
}

if (!baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData})
}
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
let catalog = {source: res.source, url: res.url, name: res.name, tab: res.tab || "novel"};

showTabTips(catalog);

let op = {method: "POST", body: catalog};

let catalogUrl = getServerHost() + `/catalog,${JSON.stringify(op)}`;
let response = java.ajax(catalogUrl);
// java.log(response);

let device = deviceType() ? 'android' : 'ios';

if (device == 'android') {
    var typeMap = {audio:32, comic:64};
    book.type = catalog.tab in typeMap ? typeMap[catalog.tab] : 8;
} else {
    var typeMap = {audio:1, comic:2, video:3};
    book.type = catalog.tab in typeMap ? typeMap[catalog.tab] : 0;
}

JSON.parse(response).data.map((x) => {
    if (x.isVolume == true) {
        x.url = "";
        return x;
    }
    
    x.url = buildChapterUrl(x, catalog, device);
    return x;
});
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
// 假设 result 变量已包含 HTML 字符串
var document = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);

var preElements = document.select('div#content-section.content-section > pre');
if (preElements.isEmpty()) {
    result = '未找到 div#content-section.content-section > pre 元素';
} else {
    var preElement = preElements.first();
    var innerHtml = preElement.html();
    
    // 定义转换函数（注意：在 Rhino 中使用 var 或 function）
    function convertHtmlToPlainTextWithLineBreaks(html) {
        var text = html;
        text = text.replaceAll(" ", " ");
        text = text.replaceAll("(?i)<p[^>]*><\\/p>", "\n");
        text = text.replaceAll("(?i)<p[^>]*>(.*?)<\\/p>", "\n$1\n");
        text = text.replaceAll("(?i)<br\\s*\\/?>", "\n");
        text = text.replaceAll("<[^>]+>", "");
        text = text.replaceAll("\\n{3,}", "\n\n");
        return text.trim();
    }
    
    // 调用函数，获取纯文本
    var plainText = convertHtmlToPlainTextWithLineBreaks(innerHtml);
    result = plainText;
}
</js>

bookSourceComment:
更新日志请点击登录，更新书源中查看

基础使用教程：
1、搜索：
    1)基础搜索：在发现页长按该书源，点击搜索，直接搜，搜索范围(全部来源小说)
    2)进阶搜索：在登陆-书源设置中选择指定模式/来源，可搜索指定模式/来源内容
    3)快捷搜索：使用特殊关键词(x,t,m,d,@)搜索
         x:书名@来源  如(x:十日终焉@番茄)
         t:书名@来源  如(t:十日终焉@番茄)
         m:书名@来源  如(m:十日终焉@番茄)
         d:书名@来源  如(d:十日终焉@番茄)
         其中：x表示小说(可省略)，t表示听书，m表示漫画，d表示短剧
         冒号支持中文英文
         
2、发现页：
    在书源设置中选择指定模式或者单个来源，然后刷新发现页即可
    
3、更多使用方式长按发现页书源选择登录一目了然
4、用户后台有视频教程
exploreUrl:
<js>
var open_argument = source.getVariable();
if (!open_argument || open_argument == '') {
    var initData = {
        tab: "小说",
        tone_id: "默认音色",
        server: host[0],
        sources: "番茄",
        source_type: "男频",
        find_source: "番茄",
        find_tab: "小说",
        fqpara: "on"
    };
    source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(initData));
    open_argument = source.getVariable();
}
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || host[0];
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_tab') || getArguments(open_argument, 'tab') || '小说';
var sources =  getArguments(open_argument, 'sources') || '番茄';
var fxyjr = getArguments(open_argument, 'fxyjr');


function checkEnv() {
    let isModified = false;
    try {
        new Packages.io.legato.kazusa.utils.TimeoutCancellationException('');
        isModified = true;
    } catch (e) {
        isModified = typeof source.loginUi == 'function' ? false : true;
    }

    return isModified;
}

var islyc = checkEnv();
let device_type = '安卓';
try {
	  try {
	  java.qread();
	  device_type ="轻阅读";
	  } catch {
	  	java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
	  	}
    
} catch (e) {
    try {
        java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (((islyc&&device_type!='苹果') || device_type=='轻阅读') && fxyjr != "on"){
	sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_source') || sources;
	setArguments('find_source', sources);
	}
var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [ ];
if (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部') {
infoData = [{
        "title": "登录番茄",
        "url": '{\{java.startBrowser("https://fanqienovel.com/","番茄登录");}}',
        "style": {
            "layout_flexGrow": 1,
            "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
        }
    }];
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架" + fqssionid);
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
//let qtcookie = ""
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};



qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url + '/get_book_shelf,' + qtop;

let qtsj = [];

if (((islyc&&device_type!='苹果') || device_type=='轻阅读') && fxyjr !="on") {
    try {
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "线路",
            host,
            base_url,
            "server",
            1
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "模式",
            ["小说", "听书", "短剧", "漫画"],
            tab,
            "find_tab",
            0.33
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "频道",
            ["男频", "女频"],
            source_type,
            "source_type",
            0.33
        ));
        let source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '书旗', '塔读', '江湖', '小米', '米读', 'QQ阅读', '酷我小说','幻梦轻小说', '西瓜小说', '69书吧', '顶点', '爱下电子书', '伪69', '超会专属小说', '3A小说', '阅友小说', '笔趣阁22', '追更人', '久久小说', '52书库', '腐小说', '完本小说', '盐选文库', '有度中文', '三零读书', '鹿鹿', '星空小说', '365小说', '冷冷文学', '万相书城', '独步小说', '福书网', '速读谷', '全本同人'];
        if (tab == '听书') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '喜马拉雅', '酷我'];
        }
        if (tab == '漫画') {
            source_list = ['全免漫画', '番茄', '包子漫画', '漫画屋', '漫画网', '漫客栈', '漫画屋'];
        }
        if (tab == '短剧') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '河马短剧', '旺旺短剧', '极速影视'];
        }
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "平台",
            source_list,
            sources,
            "find_source",
            1
        ));
       const excludeTitles = ['点击登录可切换来源', '切换后长按刷新即可'];
       style_list = style_list.filter(item => !excludeTitles.includes(item.title));
    } catch {}
} else {
	if (device_type == '安卓'){
	qtsj.push({
        "title": "下载阅读Sigma最新测试版",
        "url": '{\{java.longToast("本书源推荐使用最新版洛娅橙改版阅读Σ\\n请安装后重新导入书源");java.startBrowser("https://legado.langge.cf","下载阅读Sigma最新测试版");}}',
        "style": {
            "layout_flexGrow": 1,
            "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1
        }
    })}
	}

if (qtcookie) {
qtsj.push({
    title: "大灰狼个人中心",
    url: qtsjurl,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
    }
})
} else {
qtsj.push({
    title: "登录大灰狼书源",
    url: `{\{java.startBrowser("${base_url}/login","登录书源");}}`,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
    }
})
}


var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);

}

let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let key3 = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key3 = "";
}

if (key3 == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key3 = "";
        }
        if (key3) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            cookie.removeCookie(h);
            cookie.removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key3 + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    //let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (toneId == '') {
    	toneId= '4';
    	}
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}

});

);

        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";

    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;

if (sources == '卷') {
    content_url = item_id
} else if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && tab == "小说") {
    var base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server") || "";
    var sdtoken;
    try {
        var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
        sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
    } catch (e) {
        sdtoken = '';
    }
    var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
    var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
    var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
    var fqssionid = '';
    if (!fqcookie) {} else {
        fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
    }
    let sourcess = sources.replace('svip_', '');
    content_url = `data:;base64,${qtcontent},{"type":"qingtian3","js":"book ? result : '${base_url}/get_review?book_id=${book_id}&item_id=${item_id}&ssionid=${fqssionid}&source=${sourcess}'"}`;
} else {
    content_url = `data:;base64,${qtcontent},{"type":"qingtian3"}`;
}
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'sources') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources') || '0';
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

var Proxy = Map('代理：').split(",");

    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/127.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/127.0.0.0",
    "Accept-Language": "",
    "sec-ch-ua": "",
    "Cookie": cache.get(Get('url') + 'ck') || "",
    "proxy": Proxy.some(value => parseInt(value, 10) == parseInt(Get('ci0'), 10)) ? '' : Proxy[0],
}
cache.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "headers"),JSON.stringify(headers));
JSON.stringify(headers);
</js>

ruleContent.title:
<js>
if (Get('s') > 0) {
    var ComicId = cache.get(java.md5Encode16('ComicId' + book.bookUrl));
    var Epid = String(baseUrl).replace(/.*ep_id\"\:(\d+)\}.*/, '$1');
    var purl = 'https://www.biliplus.com/manga/?act=read&mangaid=' + ComicId + '&epid=' + Epid;
    var html = java.ajax(purl);
    if (/〔/.test(chapter.title)) {
        var title = chapter.title.match(/(.*)(〔.*)/);
        var Rtitle = title[1] + (html.includes('comic-single') ? '📡' : '') + title[2];
    } else {
        var Rtitle = chapter.title + (html.includes('comic-single') ? '📡' : '');
    }
    String(Rtitle).replace(/[📡]+/g, '📡');
}
</js>

header:
<js>
var Proxy = Map('代理：').split(",");
headers={
    "Dnt": "1",
    "Pragma": "no-cache",
    "Sec-Ch-Ua": '"Not/A)Brand";v="8", "Chromium";v="127", "Microsoft Edge";v="127"',
    "Sec-Ch-Ua-Mobile": "?1",
    "Sec-Ch-Ua-Platform": '"Android"',
    "Upgrade-Insecure-Requests": "1",
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/127.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36 EdgA/127.0.0.0",
    "Accept": "text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7",
    "Sec-Fetch-Site": "same-origin",
    "Sec-Fetch-Mode": "navigate",
    "Sec-Fetch-User": "?1",
    "Sec-Fetch-Dest": "document",
    "Accept-Language": "zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en-US;q=0.8,en;q=0.7",
    "Origin": Get('url'),
    "Referer": Get('url'),
    "proxy": Proxy.some(value => parseInt(value, 10) == parseInt(Get('ci0'), 10)) ? '' : Proxy[0],
}
cache.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "headers"),JSON.stringify(headers));
JSON.stringify(headers);
</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
eval(String(Reload('https://qyyuapi.com/sy/js/拷贝漫画/exploreUrl.js')));
</js>
header:
<js>
var Proxy = Map('代理：').split(",");
headers={
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/127.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/127.0.0.0",
    "Accept": "application/json",
    "Origin": "https://copy20.com",
    "version": "2025.07.15",
    "platform": "1",
    "webp": "1",
    "region": "0",
    "authorization": "Token",
    "proxy": Proxy.some(value => parseInt(value, 10) == parseInt(Get('ci0'), 10)) ? '' : Proxy[0]
}
if (/www\./.test(Get('url'))) {
    headers={
        "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/127.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/127.0.0.0",
        "dnts": "1",
        "proxy": Proxy.some(value => parseInt(value, 10) == parseInt(Get('ci0'), 10)) ? '' : Proxy[0]
    }
}
if (cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Token"))) {
    headers["authorization"] = cache.get(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "Token"));
}
cache.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "headers"),JSON.stringify(headers));
JSON.stringify(headers);
</js>

ruleContent.nextContentUrl:
<js>
if (!/qyyuapi/.test(baseUrl)) {
    var res = JSON.parse(result).data.pages;
    var pages = res.pages;
    var page = res.page;
    var urls = [];
    if (pages > 1 && page == 1) {
        for (i = 2; i <= pages; i++) {
            path = baseUrl.replace(/.*(comics.*page=).*/, '$1') + i;
            url = Get('url') + '/' + path;
            urls.push(url);
        }
        urls;
    }
}
</js>

var Proxy = Map('代理：').split(",");
headers={
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/127.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/127.0.0.0",

}
cache.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "headers"),JSON.stringify(headers));
JSON.stringify(headers);
</js>

<js>
var Proxy = Map('代理：').split(",");
headers={
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/127.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/127.0.0.0",
    "proxy": Proxy.some(value => parseInt(value, 10) == parseInt(Get('ci0'), 10)) ? '' : Proxy[0],
}
cache.put(java.md5Encode16(Get('url') + "headers"),JSON.stringify(headers));
JSON.stringify(headers);
</js>

ruleBookInfo.author: $.introinfo.book.author
ruleBookInfo.lastChapter:
{{$.introinfo.book.lastChapterName##正文卷.|正文.|VIP卷.|默认卷.|卷_|VIP章节.|免费章节.|章节目录.|最新章节.|[\(（【].*?[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字].*?[】）\)]}}•{{$.chapinfo.lastChapterUpdateTime##\s.*}}
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3
ruleBookInfo.name: $.introinfo.book.title

loginUrl:
<js>
var login = () => {
    var username = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("账号");
    var password = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("密码");
    var res = java.post(
      'https://hitomi.si/auth/login',
        JSON.stringify({
            username: username,
            password: password,
        }),
        {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    );
    source.putLoginHeader(JSON.stringify({
        Authorization: `Bearer ${res.body()}`
    }));
}
login();
</js>
